emptyTemplatesRoot: Click “New template” to create your first channel template, or bulk-import via CLI.
emptyTemplatesUser: No templates available. Please contact an administrator.

delDialog.title: Delete template
delDialog.message: Deletion is irreversible. Templates with existing grants cannot be deleted (disable them instead).

revokeDialog.title: Revoke grant
revokeDialog.messageForce: The channel could not be deleted or the site is unreachable. A force revoke only marks the grant as revoked; any leftover channel on the site must be cleaned up manually.
revokeDialog.message: Revoking deletes the corresponding channel from the site.
revokeDialog.messageManaged: Revoking deletes the corresponding channel from the site and revokes its metering credentials.

wizard.title: Enable template
wizard.targetSitePlaceholder: Select the site to inject the channel into
wizard.baseUrlHint: API address of your own upstream
wizard.apiKeyHint: Injected into the target engine only; never echoed back or stored
wizard.managedNote: This is a metered managed channel. The metering gateway issues dedicated access credentials for this site, so no upstream key is needed. Usage is reported back by the gateway for revenue sharing.
wizard.groupsHint: If none selected, the engine default group is used
wizard.groupsEmptyWithSite: This site has no selectable groups
wizard.groupsEmptyNoSite: Select a site to load groups
wizard.errBaseUrl: Please enter the upstream Base URL
wizard.errBaseUrlFormat: Must be a full http(s) address
wizard.errApiKey: Please enter the upstream API Key

form.keyHintCreate: Stable and unique; used for grant accounting
form.titleHint: Visible to site owners; do not include the real upstream name
form.sourceHint: byo = owner-provided; managed = issued by metering gateway
form.modelsHint: One per line, or comma-separated (public model names)
form.ratioHint: Hint only; the actual ratio is set by the site group
form.errKeyFormat: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only, starting with a letter or digit
form.errKeyLen: Key must be at most 64 characters
form.errRatio: Ratio must be a positive number
